## Automated Tests Required

### 3-1 Stamp System — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/stamp_system/stamp_system_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- `stamp_bonus_lookup(SWORD)` returns `{bonus_value=2, effect_type=DAMAGE}`
- `stamp_bonus_lookup(SHIELD)` returns `{bonus_value=2, effect_type=DEFENSE}`
- `stamp_bonus_lookup(HEART)` returns `{bonus_value=2, effect_type=HEAL}`
- `stamp_bonus_lookup(COIN)` returns `{bonus_value=10, effect_type=CHIPS}`
- `stamp_bonus_lookup(HAMMER)` returns `{bonus_value=0, effect_type=NULLIFY_TARGET}`
- `stamp_bonus_lookup(RUNNING_SHOES)` returns `{bonus_value=0, effect_type=SORT_FIRST}`
- `stamp_bonus_lookup(TURTLE)` returns `{bonus_value=0, effect_type=SORT_LAST}`
- `stamp_bonus_lookup(null)` returns `{bonus_value=0, effect_type=NONE}`
- `stamp_sort_key(RUNNING_SHOES) = 0`
- `stamp_sort_key(null/SWORD/SHIELD/HEART/COIN/HAMMER) = 1`
- `stamp_sort_key(TURTLE) = 2`

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Null stamp (unassigned card)
- CardInstance.stamp field can be set and read correctly
- Stamp overwrite (set SWORD then set COIN — old stamp discarded)

**Estimated test count**: ~15 unit tests

---

### 3-2 Card Quality System — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/quality_system/quality_system_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- All 8 quality types defined (COPPER, SILVER, GOLD, DIAMOND, RUBY, SAPPHIRE, EMERALD, OBSIDIAN)
- `quality_bonus_resolve(COPPER, III)` → `{NONE, 0, 10}`, `(COPPER, I)` → `{NONE, 0, 20}`
- `quality_bonus_resolve(DIAMOND, I)` → `{NONE, 0, 82}`
- `quality_bonus_resolve(RUBY, II)` → `{DAMAGE, 4, 0}`
- `quality_bonus_resolve(OBSIDIAN, I)` → `{DEFENSE, 5, 0}`
- `quality_bonus_resolve(null, III)` → `{NONE, 0, 0}`
- `is_valid_assignment(RUBY, DIAMONDS) = true`, `is_valid_assignment(RUBY, HEARTS) = false`
- `is_valid_assignment(SAPPHIRE, HEARTS) = true`, `is_valid_assignment(SAPPHIRE, SPADES) = false`
- `is_valid_assignment(EMERALD, CLUBS) = true`, `is_valid_assignment(EMERALD, DIAMONDS) = false`
- `is_valid_assignment(OBSIDIAN, SPADES) = true`, `is_valid_assignment(OBSIDIAN, CLUBS) = false`
- `is_valid_assignment(COPPER, any_suit) = true` (metal no restriction)
- Gem destroy prob: III=0.15, II=0.10, I=0.05
- `destroy_quality()` sets `quality=null, quality_level=III`

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Null quality (unassigned card)
- Purity level downgrade (destroy resets to III)
- Gem-suit binding violation rejected
- Metal quality has no destroy probability

**Estimated test count**: ~20 unit tests

---

### 3-3 Resolution Engine v2 — Integration
**Test file path**: `tests/integration/resolution/resolution_v2_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- Stamp effects dispatch: SWORD +2 dmg, SHIELD +2 def, HEART +2 heal, COIN +10 chips
- Quality dual-track: `combat_effect = (effect_value + stamp_combat_bonus + gem_quality_bonus) × multiplier`
- Quality dual-track: `chip_output = (chip_value_base + metal_chip_bonus + gem_chip_bonus + stamp_coin_bonus) × multiplier`
- HAMMER pre-scan: opponent same-position card nullified (skips phases 2-6)
- HAMMER mutual: both sides have HAMMER at same position → both nullified
- HAMMER no target: opponent has fewer cards → HAMMER wasted, card still resolves
- Gem destroy: seeded RNG produces deterministic destroy results
- Gem destroy independent rolls: multiple gem cards roll independently
- Full pipeline: stamp + quality + multiplier all apply in correct order
- Bust side: stamps and quality effects skipped for busting side

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Card with both stamp AND quality (both apply independently)
- All gem qualities destroyed in same round
- No stamps, no qualities (regression: MVP pipeline still works)
- HAMMER card is also gem quality — destroy check on HAMMER card itself works
- Destroyed quality does not affect stamp

**Estimated test count**: ~25 integration tests

---

### 3-4 Shop System — Integration
**Test file path**: `tests/integration/shop/shop_system_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- HP heal: `spend_chips(amount × 5)` + HP increases, cap at max_hp
- Stamp assign: `card.stamp = selected` after `spend_chips(stamp_price)`, any stamp on any suit
- Quality assign: `card.quality = selected, quality_level = III` after `spend_chips(quality_price)`
- Quality assign with gem-suit validation: RUBY on DIAMONDS ok, RUBY on HEARTS rejected
- Purify III→II costs 100, II→I costs 200
- Purify rejected if quality=null (destroyed card)
- Sell: `sell_refund = floor(total_investment × sell_price_ratio)`, stamp/quality cleared
- Weighted random: seeded RNG produces deterministic inventory
- Refresh: re-rolls random inventory at 20 chip cost
- Insufficient chips: all purchases rejected without mutation

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Buy stamp on card that already has stamp (overwrite)
- Buy quality on card that already has quality (overwrite)
- Sell card with no enhancements (refund = 0, greyed out)
- Chip cap (999) not exceeded by sell refund
- Empty inventory / all cards already enhanced
- Purify card at level I (rejected, already max)

**Estimated test count**: ~20 integration tests

---

### 3-5 Match Progression — Integration
**Test file path**: `tests/integration/match_progression/match_progression_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- NEW_GAME → OPPONENT_1 transition
- CONTINUE after non-lethal round (stays in OPPONENT_N)
- PLAYER_WIN → SHOP transition (opponents 1-7)
- SHOP → OPPONENT_N+1 transition
- PLAYER_WIN after opponent 8 → VICTORY (no shop)
- PLAYER_LOSE → GAME_OVER
- `victory_bonus` injected via `add_chips()` on opponent defeat
- AI deck regenerated per opponent via `regenerate_ai_deck()`
- AI HP scaled per opponent_number lookup table
- `opponent_number` incremented correctly
- First player alternation preserved

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Game over at opponent 1 (immediate loss)
- Victory at opponent 8 (final boss)
- Shop visit with 0 chips (can still browse, can't buy)
- Multiple rounds against same opponent (CONTINUE loop)

**Estimated test count**: ~15 integration tests

---

### 3-7 Card Sorting v2 — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/card_sorting/card_sorting_v2_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- Two-pass sort: Pass 1 manual order, Pass 2 stable_sort_by(stamp_sort_key)
- RUNNING_SHOES cards sorted to front (key=0)
- TURTLE cards sorted to back (key=2)
- Default/null cards in middle (key=1)
- Stability: same sort_key preserves manual order
- HAMMER has same sort_key as default (key=1, not special)
- AI tiebreak function interface returns deterministic order

**Edge cases to cover**:
- All cards have RUNNING_SHOES → order = manual order (all key=0)
- No stamps at all → order = manual order (all key=1)
- Single card → no reordering
- Mix of all 3 keys in one hand

**Estimated test count**: ~12 unit tests

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### 3-6 Shop UI — UI
**Verification method**: Manual step-through in Godot editor
**Who must sign off**: Developer
**Evidence to capture**: Screenshots of shop overlay showing services, inventory, and transactions

Checklist:
- [ ] Shop overlay appears after opponent defeat (opponents 1-7)
- [ ] Fixed services panel visible: HP Heal, Stamp Assign, Quality Assign, Purify, Sell
- [ ] Random inventory panel shows 2 stamps + 2 enhanced cards
- [ ] Clicking a card in player hand selects it as target for stamp/quality assignment
- [ ] HP Heal: slider/input for HP amount, cost updates dynamically, click confirms
- [ ] Stamp Assign: select stamp type, select card, confirm → stamp applied
- [ ] Quality Assign: select quality type, select card → gem-suit validation feedback
- [ ] Purify: select card → level shown, cost shown, confirm
- [ ] Sell: select enhanced card → refund shown, confirm → card reset
- [ ] Refresh button re-rolls random inventory at 20 chip cost
- [ ] Chip balance updates after every transaction
- [ ] "Close Shop" button transitions to next opponent
- [ ] Shop does not appear after opponent 8 (goes to VICTORY)

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before QA hand-off for this sprint:

1. Game starts and player can play a round (regression from Sprint 2)
2. Stamps modify card resolution output correctly
3. Quality dual-track produces correct combat + chip values
4. Shop opens after defeating an opponent
5. Player can buy a stamp and see it affect the next round's resolution
6. Match progresses through opponents 1→8 with shops in between
7. VICTORY triggered after opponent 8 defeat
8. GAME_OVER triggered on player death
9. Existing Sprint 2 smoke test (8 criteria) still passes after refactoring
10. 238+ total tests passing (no regressions)

*Smoke tests verified via `/smoke-check`. Reference this list when running that skill.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

No playtest sessions required for this sprint. All stories are Logic or Integration with objective acceptance criteria. UI story (3-6) requires manual step-through but not external playtest.

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Manual evidence exists for UI story (3-6) — screenshots in `production/qa/evidence/`
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions in existing 238 tests
- [ ] Code committed per-story (not batched)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
